title: Spicy Khanom Sausage Wrap
description: A flavorful twist on traditional Thai street food, featuring spicy khanom sausage wrapped in a crispy southern-style biscuit with tangy toppings.
instructions: Roll out southern biscuit dough to 1/4 inch thickness.
Cut into circles using a cookie cutter.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Meanwhile, cook kabanos sausage in a pan over medium-high heat, until browned.
Add thai red curry paste and fish sauce to the pan, stir to combine.
Slice baked biscuit in half, and spread with polish mustard.
Assemble the wrap by placing cooked sausage on the biscuit, topping with khanom, cilantro, and pickled carrots.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
